title: Filter person in Dashboards not working properly?

posts.author: kakemann (Jon Bergsland)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to filter a status for one specific person by choosing the responsible person on top of the dashboard (see picture).

Even though I choose to filter by a person, it also displays tasks from another person which I do not want to see in the filter.

I would assume when choosing a person to filter on, it would only show the tasks affiliated to this specific person.
Is this a bug, or maybe something I’m missing?

image1002×670 42.7 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jon!

This is definitely odd behavior. Do you run into the same issues if you reset it and try again with a different person? Or is it only when EG is selected that it shows the other person?

It would be worth reaching out to our support team here so we can troubleshoot further to see if this might be a bug!
